hero.title:
You've outgrown spreadsheets.
Now what?
hero.subtitle: Custom CRMs, workflow automation, and business dashboards that replace the patchwork of tools holding your operations together — built to integrate with what you already use, priced transparently.

services.subtitle: WHAT WE BUILD
services.title: Systems that replace the tool sprawl

items.title: Custom CRM Systems
items.desc: Stop paying per-seat SaaS fees for platforms that don't match your actual sales process. We build CRMs that map to how your team actually works — tracking leads, managing pipelines, and automating follow-ups without forcing you to change your workflow.

items.title: Marketing & Lead Automation
items.desc: Automated lead generation engines that capture, qualify, and route prospects to your sales team 24/7. Email drip campaigns, social integrations, and ad pipeline tracking — all wired together instead of scattered across five different tools.

items.title: Business Intelligence Dashboards
items.desc: Real-time operational visibility in one place. We consolidate sales metrics, inventory data, and operational KPIs into dashboards your managers actually use — replacing the end-of-month Excel report scramble with live, actionable data.

items.title: WhatsApp & Tool Integration
items.desc: Connect your existing tools into one operational flow. WhatsApp order capture, payment gateway hooks, ERP sync, and automated notifications — we wire together the systems you already run instead of asking you to replace everything.

industries.title: Real Estate & Construction
industries.desc: Lead capture pipelines, property management dashboards, and automated client communication tools for developers and agencies managing hundreds of prospects across multiple projects.

industries.title: Retail & Consumer
industries.desc: Omnichannel POS integrations, inventory tracking, and loyalty programs for retail businesses scaling from one location to many without multiplying their operational headcount.

industries.title: Home & Local Services
industries.desc: Job scheduling, automated invoicing, and field team tracking for service businesses where the back-office work grows faster than the team doing it.

cta.title: Ready to replace the tool sprawl?
cta.description: Book a scoping call. We'll map your current systems, identify the highest-impact automation targets, and give you a fixed-price proposal within a week.
